name: Central Fleet Plaza
description: Large commercial fleet charging facility. 3000 kVA (3 MW!) utility connection. Shift-change demand spikes require careful power management. The ultimate challenge. Transformer purchase required.
visual_description: Massive industrial fleet charging facility. Entry top-left, exit top-right. Wide road access lane at top and a concrete service road at the bottom two rows. Four long parallel rows of heavy-vehicle charging bays (rows 2-15) each separated by worn asphalt drive aisles. Dumpster area bottom-left corner. Loading zones marked in rows 16-17. Left road access strip (cols 0-3) and right utility strip (cols 26-29) for transformer and battery placement.
